name: IllustratedMessageComponent
description:
Component representing an illustrated message with responsive SVG illustration.

The component automatically adjusts its illustration size based on container width:
- Large (>= 682px)
- Medium (361px - 681px)
- Small (261px - 360px)
- Extra Small (161px - 260px)
- Base (< 161px)

Supports both URL-based SVG sprites and inline SVG content.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the illustrated message component.

inputs.name: noSvg
inputs.description: When true, hides the SVG illustration entirely.

inputs.name: svgAriaLabel
inputs.description: Accessible label for the SVG illustration.

inputs.name: svgConfig
inputs.description: Configuration for SVG illustrations at different sizes.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: Explicitly set the illustration type. If not provided, type is determined by container width.
